mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II Sangary Saver rework stats Aspect of Hell Omega attack channeling speed changes patch notes","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1774,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://hades.fandom.com/wiki/Post-Launch_Patch_2","title":"Post-Launch Patch 2 - Hades Wiki","content":"Aspect of Pan (Blades): now also works with Dancing Knives (Daedalus)
Melinoë has new voice lines for Lone Shades summoned by the Aspect of Anubis (Staff)
Fixed Expiring (Chaos) dealing its burst of damage despite having the effect of Breath of Eros (Charon)"},{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Patch+Notes","title":"All Patch Notes on Hades 2 Complete List | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"Note: The vast majority of changes are to the Underworld route; the Surface route is mostly unchanged.
The v1.0 Launch of Hades II has finally arrived!
While this update marks the conclusion of our Early Access development, we will be monitoring this launch closely and patching any issues that arise.
Shimmering Ambrosia: new!
Fixed Past Deeds screen not showing more than 36 Boons if you had that many
Trial of the Supreme: new!
Bounties of the Infinite Abyss: new!
Sister Blades: Omega Special shots now pierce foes (excluding the Aspect of Pan's homing shots)
You have a chance to Dodge damage; this is doubled vs.
Vow of Panic: cut from game; replaced with...
Divinity: Awakening requirement expanded to include activating a column of Cards (not just a row).
Damage preview from Hestia's Scorch Curse now appears on Guardian Life Bars.
Sister Blades (Artemis): you will Block again if the effect recharges while you are channeling; Block now takes priority over Dodge and similar effects.
Reed-Stalker: increased projectile speed and target distance; reduced rotation speed.
Fixed deadliest attack of Chronos occasionally hitting when Melinoë was in a supposedly safe point.
Umbral Flames: Attacks are stronger and faster; Omega Attack channels faster and uses less magick; Special gives a speed boost, but has reduced damage; Omega Special can be channeled while moving."},{"url":"https://kotaku.com/hades-2-patch-notes-buff-chronos-steam-early-access-1851519615","title":"Hades 2's Biggest Early Access Patch Yet Just Made A Bunch Of Weapons Stronger - Kotaku","content":"Patch 2 is full of dozens of buffs and bug fixes, as well one change that reduces how often final boss Chronos is “patently unfair.”
That includes Melinoë’s Nocturnal Arms and their abilities: Witch’s Staff, Sister Blades, Umbral Flames, Moonstone Axe, and Argent Skull.
Argent Skull now earns Glory faster when using Omega Cast and has a much more responsive Omega Special.
Here are all the latest Hades 2 patch notes:"},{"url":"https://gamerant.com/hades-2-all-patch-notes-updates-hotfixes/","title":"Hades 2 Patches","content":"Hades 2 was updated on July 16, 2024, and the patch was pretty small.
Origination: now specifies that Curses from different Olympians are required; this is relevant with Demeter, whose Cyclone now is considered a Curse (along with her Freeze)
Upgrades of Sublime quality now also raise your Hex's recharge cost (to compensate for many recharge costs having been reduced; Hexes should now be more usable throughout each night)
On May 16, 2024, Supergiant Games put out the first-ever early access patch for Hades 2.
All improvements and fixes will be in the notes below, but the patch mostly focused on improving Melinoe's sprint and turning and making it easier to gather resources on a run."}]}

Omega Attack is stronger; reworked Special is a fast powerful shot that pierces foes … channeling your Omega Attack","score":0.6964752,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/HadesTheGame/comments/1lq2kjz/hades_2_patch_10_notes","title":"Hades 2 Patch 10 Notes : r/HadesTheGame","content":"It makes sense on Thanatos but it's boring. Give the other two aspects a new cool omega attack!","score":0.6260562,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://mobalytics.gg/hades-2/guides/launch-patch-notes","title":"Hades 2 Patch Notes: v1.0 Launch Edition","content":"The patch notes below are from the original version from SuperGiant! • New Keepsakes: several new Keepsakes are waiting to be discovered... • New Decorations: liven up the Crossroads with new unlockable decor. • New Artwork: new visual effects, environment art, and other visual improvements abound. • New Music: listen for a number of stirring new tracks. · Sister Blades: increased damage and range of Attack sequence. · Moonstone Axe: increased Special speed; now easier to Dash out of the Attack sequence. · Umbral Flames (Supay): reduced Omega Special Magick cost and damage; slightly reduced Omega Attack and Omega Special rate of fire. · Minor adjustments to requirements for Hidden Aspects to be revealed to Melinoë by various characters. 📢 The stasis effect from the Stopper Perk from the Vow of Fangs now is easier to anticipate.","score":0.62358373,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.83,"request_id":"54596488-c5a3-4719-9067-9bad71d57e9b"}
